author: Ammer Ayach
name: Non-record: Delta 2 LeakyReLU^2
blurb: Isolated delta on Session 03 anchor: MLP activation from relu^2 to leaky_relu(0.5)^2. enable_math_sdp restored to True to match measured anchor state (math=True). Neutral result: sliding s64 effectively identical, slightly better quantization metrics and artifact size, but slower step time cancels quality gain.
